changes: 2026 Springtime Culinary Cats' Contest begins from Mar. 11th, 2026, 6:00 am to Mar. 18th, 2026, 6:00 am
Collect answer tickets dropped by customers, and participate in the quiz event to obtain event mementos. After getting the mementos, you can purchase limited recipes
New freshly made food: Peach Blossom Sliced Fish
Women's Day Courtyard Party returns for a limited time from Mar. 8th, 2026, 6:00 am to Mar. 11th, 2026, 6:00 am
Enter the courtyard during the event time and find White Bunny to launch the party.
Chance to get A Letter For Chef Meow
Added new customer: Peacock Sage
Added two new letters: Phantom's Letter 6 and Timmy's Essay 4
Added "Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze" themed Vegetable Garden facilities
Added "Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze" and "Energy Fruit" themed Time clocks to the Buffet
2026 Lunar New Year Event begins from 2/11/2026 until 2/25/2026
Added a new NPC: Luckyhoof
Added 3 new customers: Taowu, Three-Legged Crow, and Money Toad
Added 2 new dishes: Steamed Garlic Shrimp with Vermicelli and Sweet Sticky Rice in Lotus Root with Osmanthus Syrup
Added 2 new doll customers: Shentu and Yulei
Added 3 new booth owners: Exquisite Embroidery, Pineneedle Lacquer Fans, and Dazzing Iron Fireworks
Added 4 new letters: Eggy's Diary 25, Orca's Letter 7, and Mountain Nightscape via Hedwig and 2026 Calendar from the new CNY NPC
Added new movie: Bamboo Grove Wonderland
Added 1 new Food Truck Dish: Four Happiness Lucky Bags
Added 2 new sets of staff outfits to Field Scarecrows
Added a new pet via Limited-Time Egg Tasks: Peachy (Fruity Egg)
Added Room 6 for Pet Rooms
